channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Some in Michigan Are Genuinely Sad That Former Detroit Mayor Has Left the Governor's Race. Why?
Platner's online past gets raunchier with crude takes on 'Latin American hookers,' cheating abroad
item.description: Deleted Reddit posts show Maine Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner discussing prostitution and defending men who cheat on spouses overseas.

item.title: More Details on Shooting Outside White House, Including Alleged Shooter ID
Agitators united by Chinese money, hate for America target data centers, experts warn
item.description: Experts warn climate activists, anti-Israel protesters and other movements have formed an anti-American alliance now targeting U.S. AI infrastructure.
